title: aerangis citrata
intro: Aerangis citrata, also known as the Lemon Cattleya, is a type of orchid native to Madagascar, characterized by its bright yellow and red flowers with a distinctive citrus scent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, headaches, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aerangis citrata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and enhancing immune system function, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Aerangis citrata can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
